a.xlink:title: Checks if an audio unit exists for the given token.
Clones an audio buffer for each channel in the specified list.
Fills audio token channels from interleaved source data.
Fills interleaved buffer from audio token channels.
Removes an audio buffer from a token and channel.
Removes a processor from a specific audio token and channel.
Removes a processor from all channels in an audio token.
Removes a previously supplied buffer from a token and channel.
Routes a buffer's processing from one channel to another with fade.
Sets a final processor for an audio token (applied to all channels)
Supplies an external audio buffer to a specific token and channel.
Updates routing states for all buffers undergoing transitions.
Removes a buffer from a token (dispatches based on token type)
Removes a processor from a token (dispatches based on token)
Sets a final processor for a token (dispatches based on token)
